OUR STORY

An Atelier, Not Just a Salon

Beauty Atelier Salon was founded on a simple belief: beauty is a craft, not a checklist. Across our two Jaipur studios, a team of trained stylists, skin specialists and nail artists work with the same precision as a couture atelier — measuring, listening, and shaping each visit around you.

From your first consultation to the final finish, every appointment is unhurried, private, and tailored. We use premium, salon-grade product lines and hygiene-first tools, so the result looks as good in three weeks as it does the day you leave.

  • Certified senior stylists
  • Premium product lines only
  • Sterilised, hygiene-first tools
  • Private, appointment-only chairs
WHAT WE DO

Signature Services

Every service opens with a consultation and closes with a finishing touch — nothing is templated to the clock.

Precision Haircut & Style

Consultation-led cut, wash and blow-dry finish shaped to your face and lifestyle.

₹499+Book

Global & Balayage Colour

Ammonia-friendly colour and hand-painted balayage for dimension that grows out gracefully.

₹2,499+Book

Keratin & Smoothening

Frizz-control treatments that leave hair silky for up to 4 months, tailored to your texture.

₹3,999+Book

Signature Facials

Deep-cleanse, brightening and anti-ageing facials customised to your skin's real needs.

₹899+Book

Bridal & Party Glow

Multi-session prep packages engineered to peak exactly on your event day.

₹4,999+Book

De-Tan & Waxing

Rica and chocolate wax with soothing de-tan finish for lasting smoothness.

₹399+Book

Gel Manicure & Pedicure

Long-wear gel finish with cuticle care and hand/foot massage included.

₹799+Book

Nail Art & Extensions

Acrylic/gel extensions with hand-painted, chrome or 3D nail art finishes.

₹1,299+Book

Spa Manicure Ritual

Exfoliation, mask and extended massage for a full hand & foot reset.

₹999+Book

Book Your Appointment

Pick a studio, choose an open slot, and you're confirmed instantly — no back-and-forth calls.

Why book online

Slots update in real time so you never get double-booked, and you get an instant confirmation you can screenshot.

Live slot availability, no double-booking
Instant on-screen confirmation code
Reschedule anytime via WhatsApp

By booking you agree to receive a confirmation via SMS/WhatsApp/email.

You're Booked!

DIGITAL CONCIERGE

Ask Before You Book

Instant answers, day or night

The concierge below answers common questions instantly — hours, pricing, locations, parking.

Full voice-call and email/SMS answering (an AI receptionist that picks up your business line, replies to Gmail enquiries and texts back missed calls) is a separate backend build — it needs telephony infrastructure like Twilio Voice wired to n8n and the Anthropic API, not something a website file can do on its own. That's the natural next build once this site is live.

Hi! I'm the Beauty Atelier concierge. Ask me about hours, pricing, or locations.
